allow: Bash(git commit -m "Initial commit: AISymmetric Ultimate AI Consulting Website:*)

Bash(gh repo create "AISymmetric-Ultimate-AI-Site" --public --source=. --push --description "AISymmetric - Premium AI Consulting Website with neural network animations and interactive enterprise design")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''SSL:'', d.get\(''ssl'',{}\)\); print\(''Domain:'', d.get\(''default_domain''\)\); print\(''Custom Domain:'', d.get\(''custom_domain''\)\); print\(''Force SSL:'', d.get\(''force_ssl''\)\); print\(''SSL URL:'', d.get\(''ssl_url''\)\)")

Bash(node -e "let d='''';process.stdin.on\(''data'',c=>d+=c\);process.stdin.on\(''end'',\(\)=>{const s=JSON.parse\(d\);console.log\(''Default Domain:'', s.default_domain\);console.log\(''SSL URL:'', s.ssl_url\);console.log\(''URL:'', s.url\);console.log\(''Force SSL:'', s.force_ssl\);console.log\(''SSL:'', JSON.stringify\(s.ssl,null,2\)\);console.log\(''Custom Domain:'', s.custom_domain\);console.log\(''Published Deploy:'', s.published_deploy?.ssl_url\)}\)")

Bash(node -e "let d='''';process.stdin.on\(''data'',c=>d+=c\);process.stdin.on\(''end'',\(\)=>{const s=JSON.parse\(d\);console.log\(''Default Domain:'', s.default_domain\);console.log\(''SSL URL:'', s.ssl_url\);console.log\(''URL:'', s.url\);console.log\(''Force SSL:'', s.force_ssl\);console.log\(''SSL:'', JSON.stringify\(s.ssl,null,2\)\);console.log\(''Custom Domain:'', s.custom_domain\)}\)")
